allowed_actions: Create behavior-preserving refactor PRs that follow planned_prs.json.
Move code between modules when public CLI behavior and artifacts remain compatible.
Add or update focused tests for moved boundaries.
Run architecture gate, cargo test, and cargo clippy.
Update FDA artifacts and architecture docs to reflect completed responsibility boundaries.
forbidden_actions: Do not change public CLI behavior without a separate human spec decision.
Do not weaken architecture boundary checks.
Do not auto-merge or treat AI-side readiness as merge approval.
Do not close issue #68 until all planned PRs are merged or explicitly superseded.
Do not move domain, rendering, or application responsibilities in the opposite direction of source_architecture.md.

escalation_rules.trigger: A planned PR requires behavior change rather than behavior-preserving movement.
escalation_rules.required_action: Open a spec_decision before implementation continues.

escalation_rules.trigger: Architecture gate must be weakened to make a PR pass.
A PR touches merge/release approval semantics.

conditions: No auto-merge is allowed for this Epic.
forbidden: Any PR in this Epic requires human merge approval.
Security or merge gate semantic changes require explicit review.
